# Saralogy — Berk Saraloglu

> Senior Marketing Manager and AI tool builder based in Hamburg, Germany.
> 11+ years in integrated marketing across Samsung, BSH, and VeSync.
> Specializing in AI-native marketing for DACH SMEs.

## Key Pages
- [About](https://saralogy.com/about): Background, credentials, and career story
- [AI Marketing for DACH SMEs](https://saralogy.com/ai-marketing-dach): Methodology, framework, and implementation guide
- [FAQ](https://saralogy.com/faq): Answered questions on services, experience, and AI marketing
- [Work](https://saralogy.com/work): Case studies and consulting offerings
- [vision-intelligence](https://saralogy.com/projects/vision-intelligence): AI marketing platform for DACH SMEs (beta)
- [Career / BSH](https://saralogy.com/career/bsh): Global Siemens brand management case study
- [Now](https://saralogy.com/now): Current status and priorities (updated June 2026)

## Key Facts
- Based in Hamburg; available for Senior Marketing Manager roles (DACH)
- Languages: English (C1), Turkish (native), French (B2), German (B1)
- Kristal Elma Award winner 2019 (three awards)
- Contact: berksaraloglu@gmail.com
- 11+ years at Samsung Electronics, BSH Siemens, VeSync
- Building vision-intelligence: AI marketing platform for DACH SMEs (beta, July 2026)
